prompt: Return only TypeScript code. Write a function named clamp that takes value, min, and max numbers and returns value constrained to the inclusive range. Include explicit number parameter and return types.
expect: OpenAI-compatible Codestral coding quality and speed gate

accepted_impl_shapes: if value < min return min; if value > max return max; return value

note: Live admission qspec for the sovereign Codestral OpenAI-compatible endpoint. It intentionally gates beyond HTTP compatibility: a pass requires a non-degenerate coding answer with typed TypeScript markers inside the latency budget. The 2026-07-03 baseline smoke returned a one-character '!' after a long cold path, so this qspec is the ratchet for the speed/quality fix rather than an admission claim.
